rationale: C# type-cast bug (float vs double) in early BsonWriter; internal implementation, no spec rule violated.
BSON symbol->string decoding improvement; no specific BSON spec rule cited as violated.
LINQ provider projection bug; ORM/language-binding issue, no spec area involved.
Cursor reuse with LINQ Count() exhaustion; LINQ-specific ergonomics, not a spec-defined behavior.
Connection pool liveness-check ordering bug; internal implementation, no spec rule contradicted.
Interface refactor to use IDictionary; API ergonomics/internal refactor, no spec involvement.
DateTime.Now vs UtcNow in connection pool; internal implementation bug, no spec rule involved.
Add IMongo/IDatabase interfaces for mocking; API design improvement, no spec relevance.
LINQ query translator bug for property member access; internal LINQ implementation, no spec violation.
SortedList deserialization cast exception; C#-specific ORM serialization bug, no spec rule involved.
LINQ StartsWith/Contains returns null properties; LINQ provider bug, no spec-defined behavior.
GridFS Delete by filename misses chunk removal; implementation oversight, cannot name specific GridFS spec rule violated.
LINQ boolean expression translated to wrong query structure; internal LINQ translator bug.
Add byte[] serialization support as BSON improvement; feature addition, not a violation of a named spec rule.
LINQ $where JavaScript generation with malformed values; internal LINQ query builder bug.
FindAndModify overload recursively calls itself causing stack overflow; trivial implementation bug.
BsonReader.ReadElementType missing case for BsonType.Timestamp; BSON spec defines Timestamp type that driver failed to handle.
FindAll fails when result >16KB due to buffer chunk size bug; internal buffer management, no spec rule.
Wire protocol spec added new query options and response flags (CursorNotFound, QueryFailure); driver didn't implement them.
BsonClassMap.AutoMap lazy init bug causing LookupActualType failure; internal deserialization order issue.
SetFields(string[]) API bug; internal API method signature issue, no spec rule involved.
Save() with non-matching ID upserts random document; internal ID matching bug, no spec rule named.
Int16 serialized as document with type discriminator instead of int; BSON type mapping convention, no specific spec rule violated.
ObjectId generated to wrong (sibling) property when BsonId is in parent class; ORM/serialization convention bug.
IdPropertyConvention with custom name generates extra _id field; internal convention/ORM bug.
BsonJsonWriter uses locale-sensitive double formatting; BSON spec does not specify JSON rendering culture rules.
Id convention selects multiple properties as IDs; internal ORM convention bug, no spec rule violated.
Deserialization throws when property has private setter; internal reflection/ORM bug.
MongoDatabase collection methods require full name; API ergonomics improvement, no spec rule.
Generic List<T> persisted as document not BSON array; early serializer bug, cannot name a specific BSON spec rule violated.
InsertBatch with int _id throws 'no idGenerator for Int32'; internal ID generation convention bug.
DropAllIndexes causes stack overflow; trivial recursive call implementation bug.
Inheritance discriminator doesn't encode class hierarchy; internal ORM/serialization design decision.
MapReduce on 1M documents causes network timeout; performance/network tuning issue, no spec rule.
TranslateToBsonType doesn't handle System.Byte; BSON type mapping gap, cannot name specific BSON spec rule violated.
Period in database name crashes safe mode; input validation bug, no spec rule named.
Extra BSON fields throw FormatException during deserialization; ORM strictness policy, no spec requirement.
Deserialization fails on 2nd object due to BsonReader buffer state bug with inheritance; internal serializer bug.
ConnectionString should fallback to .config file lookup; C#-specific app config integration, not a cross-driver spec rule.
IList<T> property fails serialization while List<T> works; internal ORM/serializer type-dispatch bug.
Save() calls Insert instead of Update for string _id; internal upsert logic bug, no named CRUD spec rule violated.
BsonClassMap throws on indexed properties; internal ORM reflection handling bug.
ObjectId DataContractJsonSerializer output format; API ergonomics/interop improvement, no spec area.
RequestStart/ReleaseConnection returns in-use connection causing NullReferenceException; internal connection pool bug.
Missing getter/setter throws cryptic ArgumentNullException; internal ORM error-handling improvement.
AddToSet/AddToSetEach API improvement to accept custom C# objects; API ergonomics enhancement, no spec rule.
Int64/Double to Int32 deserialization throws; C#-specific type coercion policy, cannot name specific BSON spec rule violated.
MissingMethodException after API refactor; internal method signature break, no spec rule involved.
MapReduce.Duration throws InvalidCastException (BsonInt32 vs BsonDouble); internal type handling bug.
Unify assembly attributes into GlobalAssembly.cs; build/packaging refactor, no spec involvement.
